description: Reasoning-model chain of thought: deepseek-r1-style models emit <think>...</think> inside message content (U7/R10). The gate's scrub runs FIRST in the validator chain, strip-and-keep-remainder: the reasoning block never reaches the user, the surviving answer is delivered untouched. Pinned by tests/unit/agent/test_authority_gates_validity.py::TestThinkBlockScrub.
user_messages: When should the bearing on P-201 be replaced?

turns.content: <think>The user asks about the pump bearing. I should check the maintenance interval in the manual before answering.</think>Replace the bearing on P-201 within 48 hours.

user_text_contains: Replace the bearing on P-201 within 48 hours.
